title: Fully Labeled Human Cell

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.

imagePrompts.title: Fully Labeled Human Cell

prompt: Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.
originalPrompt: Create a fully labeled diagram of a human cell with at least 10 labeled elements. Make sure these labels are precise and accurate.

promptTranslations.zh: 生成一张完整标注的人体细胞图，包含至少10个标注元素。请确保这些标注精确且准确。
promptTranslations.fr: Créez un schéma détaillé d'une cellule humaine avec au moins 10 éléments légendés. Assurez-vous que ces légendes soient précises et exactes.
promptTranslations.ru: Создайте подробную схему клетки человека с подписями как минимум для 10 элементов. Убедитесь, что все подписи точны и соответствуют биологической реальности.
promptTranslations.pt: Crie um diagrama totalmente rotulado de uma célula humana com pelo menos 10 elementos identificados. Certifique-se de que esses rótulos sejam precisos e corretos.
promptTranslations.ja: ヒト細胞の名称付き図解を作成してください。少なくとも10個の要素にラベルを付け、それぞれの名称が正確かつ明瞭に記載されるようにしてください。
promptTranslations.ko: 최소 10개 이상의 요소에 명칭이 표기된 인간 세포의 상세 다이어그램을 생성해 줘. 각 명칭은 정확하고 명확하게 표기되어야 해.
